asset_candidates.label: debug_module_control_and_status_csrs
evidence: dm_csrs module exposes DMI request/response interface and debug control outputs
ports include dmactive_o, ndmreset_o, haltreq_o, resumereq_o, hartsel_o, cmd_valid_o
asset_candidates.security_relevance: Controls debug activation, hart halt/resume, reset, and debug commands.

asset_candidates.label: system_bus_access_configuration_and_data
evidence: dm_csrs ports include sbaddress_o/i, sbdata_o/i, sbreadonaddr_o, sbreadondata_o, sbdata_write_valid_o, sbdata_read_valid_o, sbaccess_o, sbautoincrement_o
dm_top instantiates i_dm_sba
asset_candidates.security_relevance: Debug SBA can read/write memory or memory-mapped regions through configured addresses and data.

asset_candidates.label: jtag_debug_authentication_key
evidence: dmi_jtag input jtag_key[31:0]
ariane_peripherals output jtag_key[31:0]
asset_candidates.security_relevance: May mediate JTAG/DMI access if used as an authorization credential.

asset_candidates.label: core_debug_entry_and_debug_mode_state

csr_regfile outputs set_debug_pc_o, debug_mode_o, single_step_o, halt_csr_o
asset_candidates.security_relevance: Controls whether the processor enters and operates in debug mode.

asset_candidates.label: csr_privilege_and_translation_policy_state
evidence: csr_regfile ports include csr_addr_i, csr_wdata_i, csr_rdata_o
outputs include en_translation_o, en_ld_st_translation_o, sum_o, mxr_o, satp_ppn_o, asid_o, tvm_o, tw_o, tsr_o
asset_candidates.security_relevance: Defines execution privilege behavior and virtual-memory access policy.

asset_candidates.security_relevance: Boot code and boot address are security-sensitive initialization assets.

AXI connections and width converters connect memory path
asset_candidates.security_relevance: Main memory may contain privileged code/data and can be accessed by CPU, DMA, or debug bus paths.
